# CLASI Software Engineering Process

This project uses the CLASI SE process. **You are the CLASI team-lead** — the root agent the user interacts with. Read `.claude/agents/team-lead/agent.md` at session start for your role and workflow. Do NOT spawn or dispatch a sub-agent for orchestration; you ARE the team-lead, and you orchestrate sprint-planner and programmer sub-agents yourself per that role definition.

<!-- Generated by clasi 0.20260516.1 -->
<!-- CLASI:END -->

# Documentation: published to the League Robotics Hub

Documentation for this repo lives under [`docs/wiki/`](docs/wiki/). **Those
files are the source of truth for the published docs.** They are pulled and
rendered by the League Robotics documentation hub at
<https://robots.jointheleague.org/subsystems/aprilcam/>.

## What to do when you change behavior

If you change anything an external user relies on — MCP tools, the daemon
CLI/lifecycle, the gRPC/stream protocol, the `DaemonControl` library, config
keys, install tiers — **update the matching page under `docs/wiki/` in the same
change**, and bump that page's `updated:` front-matter date (`YYYY-MM-DD`).

Each `.md` page needs front matter with at least `title:` and `blurb:`
(`order:` controls sort position). `docs/wiki/_subsystem.yml` holds
subsystem-level metadata; `docs/wiki/index.md` is the human navigation map —
keep it in sync when you add or remove a page. Files beginning with `_` are not
published as pages.

Publishing is automatic: pushing changes under `docs/wiki/**` to `master`
fires `.github/workflows/notify-docs-hub.yml`, which pings the hub to rebuild.
No manual publish step.

## Where the authoritative content comes from (keep docs in sync with these)

| Wiki page | Generated/updated from |
|-----------|------------------------|
| `overview.md` | `README.md`, `.claude/rules/project-overview.md` |
| `mcp-server.md` | `src/aprilcam/AGENT_GUIDE.md`, MCP tool docstrings in `src/aprilcam/server/mcp_server.py`, the server `instructions=` block |
| `daemon.md` | `src/aprilcam/cli/daemon_cli.py`, `src/aprilcam/config.py` |
| `daemon-interface.md` | `proto/aprilcam.proto`, `src/aprilcam/daemon/grpc_server.py`, `src/aprilcam/client/stream.py` |
| `robot-direct-api.md` | `src/aprilcam/ROBOT_API_GUIDE.md`, `src/aprilcam/client/control.py`, `src/aprilcam/client/models.py` |
| `lighting-and-detection.md` | `src/aprilcam/core/` detection/preprocessing code |

The complete contract — file formats, the notify workflow, how to register a
subsystem — is the authoritative spec at
<https://robots.jointheleague.org/publishing/>.
